channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  5. Sam Altman Says AI ‘Jobs Apocalypse’ He Once Predicted Probably Won’t Happen. What Changed?  Time Magazine

item.title: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh Dropped the Hammer With This 11-Word Statement at His Swearing-in Ceremony -- and Wall Street Isn't Ready for It - The Motley Fool
item.description:
1. Fed Chair Kevin Warsh Dropped the Hammer With This 11-Word Statement at His Swearing-in Ceremony -- and Wall Street Isn't Ready for It  The Motley Fool
  2. Kevin Warsh sworn in as Fed chair at pivotal moment for US economy  CNN
  3. Trump and Warsh's fates are now tied, for better or worse  Reuters

  5. What to Expect From Kevin Warsh’s Fed in the First 100 Days  Council on Foreign Relations
